title: Official Letters & Documents
description: This category explains common families of Polish official documents — ZUS forms, residence documents, employer documents, medical documents, and insurer documents — so you can recognize what type of document you are looking at and which institution usually owns it. It does not interpret personal letters.
owns: common document families and what they generally contain
which institution usually issues each document family
recognizing form names like ZAS-53, Z-3, Z-10, ZNp-7, OL-9
requests for filling formal gaps (braki formalne) at a general level
doesNotOwn: interpreting an uploaded or personal letter
telling you what your specific document means for your case
